summary: First-finish latency test for Abhushan Nirmata jewellery site. All 3 backend endpoints and all 15 frontend UI checks passed. Contact form successfully POSTs to /api/enquiries (200) and resets after submission.
passed: GET /api/ -> 200 with health message 'Abhushan Nirmata API is running'
POST /api/enquiries valid payload -> 200 with id + created_at
POST /api/enquiries missing required fields -> 422 validation error
GET /api/enquiries -> 200 list sorted by created_at desc (verified newest-first)
Home page loads with data-testid='home-page'; brand 'Abhushan Nirmata' visible
Navbar present with all 6 nav links (Home, Collections, Heritage, Reviews, Visit, Contact) and CALL STORE
All 4 collection cards (gold, diamond, silver, bridal) present; each links to https://wa.me/919113777874 with target=_blank
Heritage section present and contains owner name 'Anjan Kumar'
Visit section shows correct address (Rajabazar Pal Market), phone (+91 91137 77874), hours (12:00 PM – 8:30 PM), and Google Maps iframe (data-testid='visit-map')
WhatsApp FAB present linking to https://wa.me/919113777874
Contact form full flow: fill name/phone/message + interest, submit -> POST /api/enquiries returns 200, success toast 'Enquiry sent. We will get back to you shortly.' shown, form reset to empty
notes: Empty-form submit relies on native HTML5 required validation (browser-blocked, no API call fired) rather than a JS toast — this is acceptable behavior. Interest field is a native <select>, not a Radix dropdown; still works via keyboard/change. No blockers found.
